function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - nina@finance-workflow.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
---
Hi Nina,

Resending the requested invoice from 2025-12-01 (Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH), attached here.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write appears valid: recipient matches canonical Nina email, single attachment was read and ordering rule satisfied trivially. Next finalize by deleting processed inbox item.
next_step.observation: Wrote one outbound email draft record successfully with verified recipient and requested invoice attachment.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox item, created outbound draft, deleted inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted /00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the request workflow.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing an outbound email draft to Nina with the requested 2025-12-01 Nordstern invoice attached, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Applied mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read system and lane AGENTS docs, followed process-next-inbox-item and processing-inbox-email workflows, validated sender via canonical primary_contact_email, used sending-email format and timestamp rules, and deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request was a standard invoice resend. Sender from header (nina@finance-workflow.example) matched canonical entity record /10_entities/cast/nina.md primary_contact_email. Requested invoice details matched canonical finance record /50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md. Created outbound draft at /60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md with exact attachment path, then deleted processed inbox file per workflow.
